# NomadTechCareer.com

> Practical guides for tech professionals who work from anywhere.

NomadTechCareer is a content site focused on location-independent work for tech professionals. It covers remote work strategies, essential tools and setups, and in-depth city guides for popular digital nomad destinations.

## Site Structure

- Homepage: https://nomadtechcareer.com/
- Articles hub: https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/
- City Guides hub: https://nomadtechcareer.com/city-guides/

## Articles

- [5 Reasons Tech Professionals Are Choosing Location Independence in 2026](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/location-independence-tech-professionals-2026/) — Why tech pros are going location-independent: cost arbitrage, timezone flexibility, infrastructure improvements, career growth, and life experience.
- [The Digital Nomad's Tech Stack: Essential Tools for Working Anywhere](https://nomadtechcareer.com/articles/digital-nomad-tech-stack-essential-tools/) — Complete tech stack for remote work: connectivity, communication, productivity, security, finance, and hardware recommendations.

## City Guides

- [Working from Valencia, Spain](https://nomadtechcareer.com/city-guides/working-from-valencia/) — Comprehensive guide to remote work from Valencia: coworking spaces, neighborhoods, internet, costs, visa options, and daily life.

## About

Created by Gregor Spielmann. This site is built and operated with AI agents.

## Contact

- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gregor-spielmann/
